source_jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a top‑tier Backend Engineer to join our tech team and work hand‑in‑hand with our CTO, Denis Charrier https://www.linkedin.com/in/denis-charrier/, and the rest of the tech team.

Your core responsibilities will be to:

 - Build and operate large-scale, distributed systems powering AI-ready web search

 - Develop APIs, data pipelines, and microservices for indexing, retrieval, and monitoring

 - Optimize performance, scalability, and resource usage across our stack

 - Participate in architecture discussions and contribute to system design

 - Collaborate with ML and product teams to deliver data-driven features

 - Write clean, maintainable code and participate in code reviews





REQUIREMENTS

You’re a great match if you:

 - Are excited to help build Google for AI agents- and believe in Linkup’s mission https://www.notion.so/Join-Linkup-9a304f74df4544bf83d9b23c3b31b699?pvs=21

 - Have strong experience in backend development (3y minimum)

 - Understand distributed systems, caching, and data storage internals

 - Care about performance, reliability, and code quality

 - Enjoy debugging tough production issues and optimizing performance bottlenecks

 - Are curious about AI infrastructure and retrieval systems

 - Thrive in a fast-paced, high-ownership startup environment




EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Index hundred of millions of web pages every day, with < 5 min freshness

 - Add multimodal search (text + images + audio) under 150 ms

 - Stream 1 B embeddings / day for while minimizing compute costs

 - Auto‑retrain ranking on agent clicks every 24 h





OUR STACK

 - Node.js / NestJS

 - Python

 - Java

 - PostgreSQL

 - OpenSearch

 - Vespa

 - Apache Storm

 - Kubernetes

 - GitHub Actions

 - Terraform




DETAILS

The ideal candidate will play a central role in our engineering team, partnering closely with the founders to spearhead groundbreaking products. Your backend expertise will shape the future of AI‑powered applications and bring our vision to life.

We offer a flexible remote‑work policy- see the details here https://www.notion.so/Linkup-Remote-Work-Policy-d593322ac4c84988b1c7c327d6c4d39e?pvs=21.

Join us and leverage your expertise to push the boundaries of AI!




ABOUT LINKUP




OUR VISION

We believe in a future of AI agents and the agentic web. These digital entities can create more value for humanity than we ever could alone, but they depend on the internet to operate, collaborate, take action, and gather information.

AI agents need web search. To perform well, they require information that is current, reliable, and context‑specific—not the diffuse, steadily aging knowledge frozen at their last training cut‑off.

Modern web search is built for humans, not AIs. Instead of trusted facts, it serves links, ads, and click‑bait. People want visually engaging pages; AI systems need structured truth. An AI can absorb oceans of data, while human attention barely skims the surface. Humans think visually and intuitively; AI reasons in latent space.

Web 2.0 is sunsetting. The deck is being reshuffled, and the Bing‑Google search oligopoly is crumbling. Indexing ever more pages is no longer the goal; semantically organizing facts for AI systems is. In the coming agentic web, Google’s ad‑driven model has no natural home.

Search for AI must be rebuilt from the ground up. We are reconstructing the web as a rigorously structured knowledge layer, mapping every concept, entity, and claim into a coherent semantic graph. This foundation delivers verified facts and rich context to AI instantly, unlocking faster reasoning, higher accuracy, and radically more useful answers for everyone.

Humans search Google; AI searches Linkup.




OUR MISSION

Reality never stands still, and neither should intelligence. Linkup reconnects language models to a living stream of verified facts, ensuring AIs remain as current and insightful as the world they serve.

Our mission is to deliver the world’s freshest, mos

source_jobs.title: Founding GTM Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re hiring Linkup’s first GTM Engineer — a technical builder who will architect the systems powering how we grow, learn, and engage with users.

This role sits at the intersection of data, automation, and go-to-market strategy. You’ll build the connective tissue between our external growth (outbound, inbound, marketing) and internal success (sales, product, and forward-deployed engineering).

You’ll automate how we find, qualify, and reach new users; identify how Linkup delivers value to users; and ensure those learnings flow back into our marketing, sales, and product loops.

It’s a high-impact, high-ownership role — you’ll work directly with the founders to define how Linkup scales.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build scalable growth systems — from outbound automation to usage-based lead scoring and CRM enrichment.

 - Design and maintain integrations across our GTM stack (Attio, Slack, Notion, LinkedIn, internal APIs, etc.).

 - Feed qualified leads to the sales and forward-deployed teams through automated workflows and analytics.

 - Build automation that captures and structures signals from new users to drive conversion and engagement and support product specialists.

 - Build systems that support retention, expansion and customer-success outreach (e.g., detecting churn risk, triggering re-engagement)




WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

This is the first GTM engineering role at Linkup — the bridge between our growth engine and our product.

You’ll connect the dots between who discovers Linkup, how they use it, and what makes them successful.

By automating our growth stack and uncovering patterns in user behavior, you’ll give our sales, marketing, and forward-deployed teams the leverage they need to scale impact.

If you love blending code, data, and storytelling to drive growth, this role was made for you.




YOU’RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU

 - Have 2 years+ relevant experience, ideally in fast-growing technology/SaaS company.

 - Hands-on with modern GTM stacks (CRM, APIs, enrichment tools, workflow automation).

 - Comfortable with Python, SQL, and API integrations — bonus for experience with LLM or search APIs.

 - Demonstrated ability to turn messy data and processes into scalable systems that drive pipeline or adoption.

 - Want to work with important ownership in a high intensity, fast moving environment.

 - Are excited to help build Google for AI agents and believe in Linkup’s mission.




EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Build an autonomous outbound sequence combining LinkedIn, email, and product usage signals.

 - Design a pipeline that analyzes prospect queries and crafts personalized reach-outs.

 - Use our internal web index to identify similar companies to top users — and contact them automatically.

 - Connect CRM and product data to prioritize high-intent accounts in real time.

 - Run experiments to uncover the highest-performing messaging, timing, and channels.

 - Create inbound automation to surface product insights for forward-deployed teams.




OUR STACK

 - Node.js / NestJS

 - Python

 - Java

 - PostgreSQL

 - RocksDB

 - Vespa

 - Apache Storm

 - vLLM

 - Kubernetes

 - GitHub Actions

 - Terraform




DETAILS

The ideal candidate will play a central role in our GTM team, partnering closely with the founders to spearhead groundbreaking products. Your expertise will shape the future of AI‑powered applications and bring our vision to life.

We offer a flexible remote‑work policy- see the details here https://www.notion.so/Linkup-Remote-Work-Policy-d593322ac4c84988b1c7c327d6c4d39e?pvs=21.

Join us and leverage your expertise to push the boundaries of AI!




ABOUT LINKUP




OUR VISION

We believe in a future of AI agents and the agentic web. These digital entities can create more value for humanity than we ever could alone, but they depend on the internet to operate, collaborate, take action, and gather information.

AI agents need web search. To perform well, they require information that is current, reliable

source_jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a top‑tier Full Stack Engineer to join Linkup and work hand‑in‑hand with our CTO, Denis Charrier https://www.linkedin.com/in/denis-charrier/, and the rest of the tech team.

Your core responsibilities will be to:

 - Build and operate large-scale, distributed systems powering AI-ready web search

 - Develop APIs, frontends, and data pipelines for indexing, retrieval, and monitoring

 - Design and implement intuitive, high-performance user interfaces for developers and enterprise users

 - Maintain our web app and other user-facing products

 - Optimize performance, scalability, and resource usage across our stack

 - Participate in architecture discussions and contribute to system design

 - Collaborate with ML and product teams to deliver data-driven features

 - Write clean, maintainable code and participate in code reviews

You’re a great match if you:

 - Are excited to help build Google for AI agents- and believe in Linkup’s mission https://www.notion.so/Join-Linkup-9a304f74df4544bf83d9b23c3b31b699?pvs=21

 - Have strong experience in both frontend and backend development (3y minimum)

 - Understand distributed systems, APIs, and modern frontend frameworks (React or similar)

 - Care about performance, reliability, and code quality — both server-side and client-side

 - Enjoy debugging tough production issues and optimizing performance bottlenecks

 - Are curious about AI infrastructure and retrieval systems

 - Thrive in a fast-paced, high-ownership startup environment

source_jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a top‑tier DevOps Engineer to join Linkup and work hand‑in‑hand with our CTO, Denis Charrier https://www.linkedin.com/in/denis-charrier/, and the rest of the tech team.

Your core responsibilities will be to:

 - Build and operate large-scale, distributed systems powering AI-ready web search

 - Design, implement, and maintain infrastructure for indexing, retrieval, and monitoring

 - Automate deployment, scaling, and observability across all environments

 - Optimize performance, scalability, and resource usage across our stack

 - Participate in architecture discussions and contribute to system design

 - Collaborate with ML and backend teams to streamline CI/CD and model deployment workflows

 - Write clean, maintainable infrastructure code and participate in reviews




REQUIREMENTS

You’re a great match if you:

 - Are excited to help build Google for AI agents- and believe in Linkup’s mission https://www.notion.so/Join-Linkup-9a304f74df4544bf83d9b23c3b31b699?pvs=21

 - Have strong experience with cloud infrastructure (preferably on AWS, GCP or Azure) and container orchestration (Kubernetes) (2y minimum)

 - Understand distributed systems, networking, and infrastructure as code (e.g. Terraform)

 - Care about performance, reliability, and system observability

 - Enjoy debugging tough production issues and optimizing infrastructure bottlenecks

 - Are curious about AI infrastructure, data pipelines, and large-scale retrieval systems

 - Build robust observability and alerting systems for real-time search and ranking performance

 - Automate retraining workflows for models running on GPU clusters

 - Reduce deployment times and costs through improved CI/CD pipelines and caching layers

 - Java

 - Vespa

 - GitHub Actions

source_jobs.title: Founding DevRel Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE


We’re looking for a founding Developer Relations Engineer to help make Linkup the most exciting AI company for developers.

You’ll shape how developers discover, understand, and build with Linkup — creating demos, SDKs, content, and experiences that inspire builders and accelerate adoption.

This is a hands-on, outward-facing role that combines engineering, storytelling, and community. You’ll work closely with our product, GTM, and marketing teams to build relationships, run events, and shape how developers experience Linkup — from local meetups to global hackathons.

You’ll combine technical depth with creative communication — helping developers adopt Linkup through hands-on projects, public demos, and community engagement




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Be on the ground: attend and host local events, run meetups, and build relationships across the Bay Area and US developer ecosystem.

 - Build and ship polished demos, sample apps, and starter kits that showcase what’s possible with Linkup’s APIs.

 - Develop and maintain SDKs, templates, and reference implementations for AI and agentic workflows.

 - Design and deliver workshops and presentations that teach developers how to integrate Linkup into real products.

 - Produce technical content — blog posts, tutorials, videos, and benchmarks that make complex tech approachable.

 - Collaborate with product, GTM, and solutions teams to turn developer success stories into public examples and resources.

 - Collect and synthesize developer feedback to inform product and developer experience priorities.

 - Build partnerships with other tech companies to co-host events and create shared demos.

 - Track impact: measure content and community performance, iterate on formats, and scale what resonates.





REQUIREMENTS

You’re a great match if you:

 - Have 3+ years of relevant experience, working directly with developers in organizations/platforms that service them

 - Have strong engineering skills (JavaScript/TypeScript or Python) and a creative streak.

 - Love shipping fast, creative, and beautifully polished projects.

 - Are comfortable on stage — speaking, teaching, or demoing to live audiences.

 - Know how to turn technical depth into compelling storytelling.

What would be big plus to have:

 - Hands-on experience with APIs, LLMs, and DevTools.

 - A track record of organizing meetups, workshops, or hackathons with measurable engagement or outcomes.

 - Existing community connections in the Bay Area / New York that can accelerate developer outreach.

 - A portfolio of demos, talks, or tutorials showcasing strong developer-facing communication.

 - Prior open-source contributions or participation in active developer communities.




DETAILS

The ideal candidate will play a central role in our GTM team in the US, partnering closely with the founders to spearhead groundbreaking products. Your expertise will shape the future of AI‑powered applications and bring our vision to life.

We offer a flexible remote‑work policy- see the details here https://www.notion.so/Linkup-Remote-Work-Policy-d593322ac4c84988b1c7c327d6c4d39e?pvs=21.

Join us and leverage your expertise to push the boundaries of AI!




ABOUT LINKUP




OUR VISION

source_jobs.title: Research Scientist
source_jobs.description:
About the role

We’re looking for a top‑tier Research Scientist to join our tech team.

Your core responsibilities will be to:

 - Lead Research for Linkup

 - Design and implement state-of-the-art retrieval and ranking systems for AI agents

 - Prototype, train, and evaluate new models for factual search and multimodal understanding

 - Build robust research pipelines, develop, deploy, and iterate on experiments end-to-end

 - Master the technical scope of your domain and raise the bar for scientific and engineering rigor

 - Collaborate on research roadmaps and drive key modeling and evaluation decisions

 - Own large cross-functional initiatives from exploration to production

 - Work autonomously alongside the CTO and the rest of the Software & ML teams

 - Contribute to a strong research culture through experiment tracking, reviews, and knowledge-sharing





REQUIREMENTS

You’re a great match if you:

 - Are excited to help build Google for AI agents- and believe in Linkup’s mission https://www.notion.so/Join-Linkup-9a304f74df4544bf83d9b23c3b31b699?pvs=21

 - Have strong experience in research in information retrieval, computer science or machine learning. PhD is preferred, MS. is a must. (5y of experience minimum)

 - Bring hands-on experience with LLMs, NLP, embeddings, or information retrieval systems

 - HNSW and ANNs are second nature to you

 - Care about performance, reliability, and code quality

 - Enjoy optimizing performance bottlenecks

 - Thrive in a fast-paced, high-ownership startup environment




EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Train a new embeddings model from scratch

 - Build and maintain an evaluations framework to measure the progress of our search engine

 - Design a RL framework to integrate AI preferences into our ranking algorithm





OUR STACK

 - Node.js / NestJS

 - Python

 - Java

 - PostgreSQL

 - OpenSearch

 - Vespa

 - Apache Storm

 - vLLM

 - Kubernetes

 - GitHub Actions

 - Terraform




DETAILS

The ideal candidate will play a central role in our team, partnering closely with the founders to spearhead groundbreaking products. Your research expertise will shape the future of AI‑powered applications and bring our vision to life.

We offer a flexible remote‑work policy- see the details here https://www.notion.so/Linkup-Remote-Work-Policy-d593322ac4c84988b1c7c327d6c4d39e?pvs=21.

Join us and leverage your expertise to push the boundaries of AI!

source_jobs.title: Founding Forward Deployed Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a top-tier Forward Deployed Engineer to join Linkup and work hand-in-hand with our founders, customers, and partners. This is our first hire at this role.

Your mission: help leading AI companies, developers, and enterprises integrate Linkup’s AI-ready search APIs into their products — and shape how the next generation of AI agents connects to the web.

This is a highly cross-functional role. You’ll operate at the intersection of engineering, GTM, and customer success, turning technical integrations into insights that drive our product roadmap, marketing narratives, and outbound strategy.

You’ll be the connective bridge between what customers build with Linkup and how we tell that story to the world.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Work directly with customers and partners to design, prototype, and deploy integrations of Linkup’s APIs into real-world agentic systems.

 - Participate in pre-sales efforts — technical discovery, proof-of-concept design, demo environments.

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with backend, ML, and product teams to ensure performance and reliability at scale.

 - Partner with the GTM Engineer and DevRel team to turn customer learnings into automation, tutorials, and playbooks.

 - Identify and implement technical integrations with our other partners ****in the value chain (workflow orchestration, AI frameworks, etc.)

 - Translate complex technical concepts into clear explanations for both developers and business audiences.




WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

Every integration you build helps define how AI systems connect to live, trusted information.

You’ll operate on the frontier between customers and product — bringing the voice of the field into everything we build and say.

Your work will inform:

 - The stories we tell in marketing.

 - The use cases we automate in our GTM systems.

 - The features we prioritize in our roadmap.

If you love blending engineering with impact — building things users actually depend on — this role is for you.




YOU’RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU

 - 4+ years in technical support engineering, software engineering, or solutions engineering, with direct application development experience.

 - Strong API integration skills — able to design and debug REST/JSON payloads, manage auth flows, and optimize latency.

 - Understand web infrastructure, distributed systems, or retrieval pipelines.

 - Are comfortable debugging integrations and solving ambiguous technical challenges in customer environments.

 - Communicate clearly and empathetically with both technical and business audiences.

 - Are curious about AI infrastructure, retrieval, and the emerging agentic ecosystem.

 - Thrive in a fast-paced, high-ownership startup environment.


EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Help a partner integrate Linkup’s /search endpoint into their multi-agent workflow.

 - Build a proof-of-concept combining a customer’s private data with Linkup’s real-time web results.

 - Collaborate with the backend team to improve SDK telemetry and enterprise deployment reliability.

 - Work with the GTM team to turn successful integrations into published use cases and reference architectures.

 - Identify recurring customer needs that can become productized templates or automation.




ABOUT LINKUP




OUR VISION

We believe in a future of AI agents and the agentic web. These digital entities can create more value for humanity than we ever could alone, but they depend on the internet to operate, collaborate, take action, and gather information.

AI agents need web search. To perform well, they require information that is current, reliable, and context‑specific—not the diffuse, steadily aging knowledge frozen at their last training cut‑off.

source_jobs.title: Founding Marketing Lead
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a top-tier Founding Marketing Lead to join our team and work hand-in-hand with our founders. This is our first marketing hire.

Your core responsibilities will be to:

 - Define and execute Linkup’s marketing strategy, from positioning to growth experiments

 - Build and operate the systems powering our brand, community, and inbound pipeline

 - Design multi-channel campaigns across content, social, events, and paid acquisition

 - Turn technical capabilities into compelling stories that resonate with developers and enterprises

 - Lead launches and PR initiatives for new products and partnerships

 - Collaborate with product, GTM, and engineering to craft narratives around our AI-ready search infrastructure

 - Measure, analyze, and iterate on campaigns to optimize awareness, engagement, and conversion





REQUIREMENTS

You’re a great match if you:

 - Are excited to help build Google for AI agents, and believe in Linkup’s mission

 - Have strong experience (3y+) in marketing for a technical product, ideally APIs, infrastructure, or AI

 - Understand marketing funnels, growth channels, and brand positioning in technical markets

 - Are an exceptional storyteller, both strategic and hands-on with content and distribution

 - Enjoy turning complex technology into simple, inspiring messaging

 - Are data-driven, analytical, and creative in equal measure

 - Thrive in a fast-paced, high-ownership startup environment




EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Launch our "Web Retriever" category and drive awareness among AI developers

 - Collaborate with our CEO and an agency to rebrand Linkup and redesign our website

 - Design and execute campaigns around new Linkup endpoints and integrations

 - Build our content engine, blog, newsletter, case studies, and founder thought leadership

 - Run growth experiments across paid, social, and community channels

 - Partner with ecosystems (Cloudflare, FriendliAI, Qdrant…) to co-market joint launches

 - Create dashboards to track user acquisition, activation, and retention





DETAILS

The ideal candidate will play a central role in our GTM team, partnering closely with the founders to spearhead groundbreaking products. Your expertise will shape the future of AI‑powered applications and bring our vision to life.

source_jobs.title: Founding Sales
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a top-tier sales to join our go-to-market team as the first account executive and work hand-in-hand with our founders and the rest of the GTM team.
You’ll play a key role in bringing Linkup, the search layer for AI agents, to market, working with some of the most advanced teams in AI.

Your core responsibilities will be to:

 - Own the full sales cycle: from outreach and discovery to demo, negotiation, and close

 - Partner with high-intent inbound leads across AI, data, and enterprise segments

 - Run compelling product demos and solutioning sessions with technical teams

 - Understand customer workflows deeply and position Linkup’s APIs and infrastructure as the foundation for their AI systems

 - Collaborate closely with Product and Engineering to craft custom solutions and feed insights from the field

 - Build repeatable playbooks for selling to AI-native teams and enterprise innovation groups

 - Contribute to GTM strategy, pricing, and messaging based on market feedback

 - Track and report key metrics across pipeline, win rate, and expansion opportunities





REQUIREMENTS

You’re a great match if you:

 - Are excited to help build Google for AI agents, and believe in Linkup’s mission

 - Have 4+ years of experience in B2B SaaS or technical sales (AI, developer tools, or data infra a plus)

 - Are comfortable engaging with technical buyers, founders, CTOs, engineers, and data teams

 - Bring a consultative approach, you focus on understanding pain points before pitching features

 - Have a proven track record of closing multi-stakeholder, high-value deals

 - Communicate clearly, tell a compelling story, and can tailor the narrative to any audience

 - Thrive in a fast-paced, high-ownership startup environment




EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Close a deal with an AI infrastructure startup building multi-agent workflows on Linkup

You’ll wear many hats. Your core responsibilities will be to:

 - Collaborate on road‑mapping and drive key technical decisions

source_jobs.title: Senior Data Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a top-tier Senior Data Engineer to join our tech team and work hand-in-hand with our CTO, Denis Charrier, and the rest of the tech team.

Your core responsibilities will be to:

 - Build and operate large-scale, high-throughput data pipelines powering AI-ready web search

 - Design and maintain distributed ETL / ELT workflows for web indexing, embeddings, and analytics

 - Develop and optimize data ingestion and transformation systems across structured and unstructured sources

 - Manage and scale data storage layers (SQL, NoSQL, and object stores) for performance and reliability

 - Participate in architecture discussions and contribute to system design for data infrastructure

 - Collaborate with ML and backend teams to deliver high-quality, real-time data for ranking and retrieval

 - Write clean, maintainable code and participate in code reviews





REQUIREMENTS

You’re a great match if you:

 - Are excited to help build Google for AI agents — and believe in Linkup’s mission

 - Have strong experience in data engineering or backend development (3y minimum)

 - Understand distributed systems, data modeling, and streaming architectures

 - Care about data quality, observability, and system reliability

 - Enjoy debugging tough pipeline issues and optimizing for latency or throughput

 - Are curious about AI infrastructure, indexing systems, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)

 - Thrive in a fast-paced, high-ownership startup environment




EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Stream and transform billions of web facts per day under strict freshness SLAs (< 5 min)

 - Build a real-time data lake to serve embeddings, metadata, and ranking features to LLMs

 - Design fault-tolerant pipelines for continuous crawling, deduplication, and enrichment

 - Develop internal tools to monitor and profile data flows across terabytes of web-scale content





OUR STACK

 - Node.js / NestJS

 - Python

 - Java

 - PostgreSQL

 - OpenSearch

 - Vespa

 - Apache Storm

 - Kubernetes

 - GitHub Actions

 - Terraform




DETAILS

The ideal candidate will play a central role in our engineering team, partnering closely with the founders to spearhead groundbreaking products. Your expertise will shape the future of AI‑powered applications and bring our vision to life.

We offer a flexible remote‑work policy- see the details here https://www.notion.so/Linkup-Remote-Work-Policy-d593322ac4c84988b1c7c327d6c4d39e?pvs=21.
